title: Cleanly
body:
# CLEANLY
**Cleanly** is a minimalist texture pack designed to refine and simplify Minecraft’s visuals without changing its core identity. It cleans up noisy, cluttered, or inconsistent block textures to make everything look sharper, smoother, and more consistent.

### If your gonna showcase/distrubute any of my packs anywhere e.g youtube, discord then you must use the modrinth link

## [Check out my other packs here!](https://modrinth.com/user/JJ_00_EPICS)

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1405336e5828aa267900695af99f44ccfe66151d.png)

Perfect for players who want performance, clarity, and a modern, tidy look — **Cleanly** makes your world feel lighter, cleaner, and more focused.
